purpose: Initializes the program by setting current date and opening output files.
Reads the next authorization summary from IMS and processes it by writing to output and initiating detail processing.
Closes the output files and displays error messages if closing fails.
Abnormally terminates the program with return code 16 if an error occurs during file opening.
Abnormally terminates the program with return code 16 if an error occurs during second file opening.
Processes child segments (authorization details) for the current parent account by reading and writing detail records until no more child segments are found.
Terminates the program with a return code of 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during the retrieval of authorization summary records.
Terminates the program with a return code of 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during the retrieval of authorization detail records.
